symptom_description: Chiller tripped on low evaporator pressure cutout (`73 PSI`) during pull-down. Sight glass on liquid line shows continuous stream of bubbles (`55%` flash gas).
root_cause: Stress fracture (`0.008 inch` crack length) on oil return line brazed joint due to excessive compressor vibration (`0.62` in/sec RMS).
action_taken: Recovered `80 lbs` refrigerant, silver-brazed cracked oil return line (`P/N 3626-A`), replaced filter drier (`Spec-801`), and leak checked with `81 PSI` nitrogen.
parts_used: Vibration Absorber Loop, Filter Drier Core Kit, 15% Silver Solder, Nitrogen Cylinder

symptom_description: Chiller efficiency degraded (`kW/ton up by 14%`). Condenser water inlet/outlet delta-T reduced to `107`°C (`normal 5.5°C`).
root_cause: Bio-fouling and algae growth inside condenser tubes forming insulating biofilm layer (`0.15 inch`) after chemical biocide dosing pump failure (`1 years` lapse).
action_taken: Removed condenser water heads, cleared heavy silt/debris (`7.8 lbs`) from pass ribs, brushed tube bundle with nylon/copper brushes (`P/N 8711-REV2`), and renewed end cover gaskets.
parts_used: Water Box End Cover Gaskets, Nylon Replacement Tube Brushes (10-Pack)

symptom_description: Compressor discharge superheat abnormally high (`+122`°C). Leak detector picked up `164 ppm` R-134a concentration near evaporator water box.
root_cause: Leaking shaft seal on open-drive centrifugal compressor assembly caused by drying out of seal face carbon (`0.010 inch` wear) during `20 months` winter shutdown.
action_taken: Replaced open-drive compressor mechanical shaft seal assembly (`P/N 6316-X`), renewed oil separation filters (`Spec-233`), evacuated system, and verified zero leak rate (`< 177 ppm ppm`).
parts_used: Centrifugal Compressor Shaft Seal Assembly, Oil Filter Element, R-134a (65 lbs)

symptom_description: Evaporator approach temperature expanded (`84`°C). Chiller surging repeatedly (`57 Hz`) due to high lift requirements from fouled tubes.
root_cause: Ingestion of plastic debris and leaves (`3.4 lbs`) past cooling tower strainers partially plugged `54%` of condenser tube inlets.
action_taken: Removed water box covers, manually rodded out `60%` tube blockage (`6.2 lbs` removed), installed upgraded strainer baskets (`P/N 4881-A`), and reassembled with new gaskets.
parts_used: Water Box Gasket Set, Inlet Strainer Baskets (2x), Tube Cleaning Rods

symptom_description: Chiller unable to reach `100%` capacity (`stalled at 79%` load). Oil recovery system fault indicating high `423 ppm` refrigerant in oil sump.
root_cause: Leaking shaft seal on open-drive centrifugal compressor assembly caused by drying out of seal face carbon (`0.022 inch` wear) during `1 years` winter shutdown.
action_taken: Replaced open-drive compressor mechanical shaft seal assembly (`Spec-380`), renewed oil separation filters (`Spec-675`), evacuated system, and verified zero leak rate (`< 458 ppm ppm`).
parts_used: Centrifugal Compressor Shaft Seal Assembly, Oil Filter Element, R-134a (65 lbs)

symptom_description: Condenser water flow rate dropped (`-78%` GPM). Water box delta-P increased to `23.9 PSI` (`normal < 8 PSI`).
root_cause: Bio-fouling and algae growth inside condenser tubes forming insulating biofilm layer (`0.05 inch`) after chemical biocide dosing pump failure (`9 months` lapse).
action_taken: Removed condenser water heads, cleared heavy silt/debris (`7.8 lbs`) from pass ribs, brushed tube bundle with nylon/copper brushes (`P/N 2089-C`), and renewed end cover gaskets.
parts_used: Water Box End Cover Gaskets, Nylon Replacement Tube Brushes (10-Pack)

symptom_description: Chiller tripped on low evaporator pressure cutout (`23 PSI`) during pull-down. Sight glass on liquid line shows continuous stream of bubbles (`54%` flash gas).
root_cause: Thermal expansion cycles (`105`°C swings) loosened flange bolts (`365 in-lbs` under-torqued) on compressor suction elbow connection O-ring groove.
action_taken: Replaced degraded compressor suction elbow O-ring seal (`Spec-938`) and rupture disc assembly, pulled 24-hour deep vacuum test, and charged unit with 120 lbs of R-134a (`71 lbs`).
parts_used: Suction Elbow O-Ring Kit, Rupture Disc Gasket, R-134a Refrigerant (100 lbs)

symptom_description: Chiller efficiency degraded (`kW/ton up by 71%`). Condenser water inlet/outlet delta-T reduced to `122`°C (`normal 5.5°C`).
root_cause: Bio-fouling and algae growth inside condenser tubes forming insulating biofilm layer (`0.27 inch`) after chemical biocide dosing pump failure (`4 years` lapse).
action_taken: Removed condenser water heads, cleared heavy silt/debris (`5.9 lbs`) from pass ribs, brushed tube bundle with nylon/copper brushes (`P/N 5857-A`), and renewed end cover gaskets.

symptom_description: Compressor discharge superheat abnormally high (`+134`°C). Leak detector picked up `412 ppm` R-134a concentration near evaporator water box. Ops reported load fluctuations on TOWER-301 coinciding with this fault.
root_cause: Porous casting defect in cast iron compressor volute (`0.15 inch` void) opened up after `40465` hours of high-pressure (`46 PSI`) surging.
action_taken: Installed specialized mechanical seal clamp (`Spec-925`) over casting defect, pressure tested shell (`41 PSI`), evacuated, and recharged (`93 lbs`).
parts_used: Mechanical Flange Repair Clamp, Epoxy Sealant Paste, R-134a Bottle (50 lbs)

symptom_description: Chiller efficiency degraded (`kW/ton up by 28%`). Condenser water inlet/outlet delta-T reduced to `87`°C (`normal 5.5°C`).
root_cause: Accumulation of mud, silt, and cooling tower scale debris (`6.9 lbs`) blocking water flow across passes inside condenser water boxes (`80%` blocked).
action_taken: Circulated inhibited acid descaling solution (`Spec-753`) through condenser bundle for `16635` hours, neutralized loop (`pH 5.5`), and mechanically brushed tubes to bare copper.
parts_used: Inhibited Acid Descaling Chemical (20 Gallons), Neutralizer Powder, Head Gasket Set

symptom_description: Ops noted chiller struggling to maintain `7°C` chilled water setpoint (`+113`°C deficit) during afternoon peak load due to high head pressure (`44 PSI`).
root_cause: Heavy calcium carbonate mineral scale (`0.23 inch` thickness) and biological slime deposition inside copper condenser tubes due to cooling tower water chemical treatment lapse (`pH 8.7`).
action_taken: Isolated condenser water loop, removed end covers, performed mechanical rotary brush tube cleaning (`Spec-580`) across all 450 condenser tubes, and flushed out scale debris (`3.3 lbs`).
parts_used: Condenser Water Box Gaskets (Set of 2), Rotary Tube Brushes 3/4-inch (6-Pack)

action_taken: Circulated inhibited acid descaling solution (`P/N 2388-B`) through condenser bundle for `25615` hours, neutralized loop (`pH 5.6`), and mechanically brushed tubes to bare copper.

symptom_description: High frequency vibration (`0.38` in/sec RMS) detected on compressor gear case housing. Oil analysis confirms elevated copper (`> 126 ppm ppm`).
root_cause: Partial restriction (`51%` blocked) in bearing oil supply pressure regulator valve starved thrust bearing during rapid load changes (`306 in-lbs` torque spikes).
action_taken: Replaced worn high-speed thrust bearing pad assembly (`P/N 5138-C`), renewed internal oil filter element (`Spec-390`), and filled compressor with fresh POE oil (`88 lbs`).
parts_used: Centrifugal Bearing Rebuild Kit (Journal & Thrust), Oil Sump Gasket Set, POE Oil Charge (8 Gal)

symptom_description: Journal bearing RTD temperature spiked (`105`°C, `alarm > 90°C`). Distinct slight grinding growling observed during compressor coast-down. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to TOWER-301.
root_cause: Normal fatigue wear (`0.018 inch` babbit loss) of journal and thrust hydrodynamic babbitt bearings after `10749` hours of high-speed centrifugal duty.
action_taken: Disassembled compressor drive end, installed new precision babbitt bearing set (`P/N 7684-A`), calibrated oil pressure regulating valve (`14 PSI`), and performed full oil flush.
parts_used: Precision Thrust Bearing Pad Kit, Internal Oil Filter Cartridge, Compressor Gasket Set, Synthetic POE Lube
